item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.92,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第一轮提前课前通知，到课率从70%到76%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第二轮缩短消息正文，到课率到79%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第三轮改成日历邀请，到课率到82%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天想把提醒时间再前移，目标85%"}],"abstain_reason":"Legal convergence exclusion: the attendance-improvement object is being directly iterated, each prior step reports measurable improvement on the primary metric, and no unresolved same-class recurrence is shown."}
